title: Luffy Carries Oden’s Will Forward
description: On pages 20–25, this part focuses on Unknown person #21, Unknown person #22, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #24, Kaido, Zoro as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pokin' his nose in where it don't belong...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The tool I need just happens to be lying right here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll show you I can do it, you stupid swordsman.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never thought I'd see one in person!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji's Wedding Special: Dragon Boat of Dragon Salmon Sasha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How the heck did you manage to filet that thing?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I happened across an amazin' man out at sea.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At least let me introduce you to my friends and family!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, we're pirates. Just a bunch of lawbreakers sailing through.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: We don't belong at a wedding banquet.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 28 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
